item.name: Pewter Leg Gear Coffer (IL 525)
item.description:
A pewter-lined chest containing a piece of attire for the legs, providing you have no more than the standard number.

Required level: 82. IL: 525. Leg gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
